name: vis-network
when_to_use: 需要把 nodes/edges 两数组直接变成可拖拽、可缩放、可聚类的中小型物理网络图时用它,而非手写 canvas——原生在力学稳定、命中测试和视口变换上失败;非做万级节点 WebGL 图或严格分层排版。
why_valuable: AI 默认做不到稳定的力导向求解、canvas 节点命中测试、拖拽缩放与聚类状态协同;徒手只能画静态关系线,交互物理网络成功率为 0%。

data_in.note: 这是 vis-network 原生字段:边端点必须叫 from/to,不是 source/target。

nodes.value?: number —— 默认不启用数值缩放

edges.id?: string | number —— 默认由内部数据集生成
edges.from: string | number —— 必须引用 nodes.id
edges.to: string | number —— 必须引用 nodes.id

spec.note: Network canvas 读取容器尺寸;默认容器 height 400px,禁用 vh/百分比高。默认 autoResize 可跟随容器尺寸变化。

example._why: 网络图库对边端点字段分歧很大,minimal 钉死本库的 from/to。

uplink: display/local-interact 默认不上行;节点焦点或视口状态若需外传,由消费 AI 直接接库的原生回调并按载体处理。

carriers.widget: supported:使用 peer ESM 并把 vis-network.min.css 显式放进 shadow,避免 standalone build 向 head 注样式
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + canvas,无 worker/wasm/uplink 硬依赖

isolation.evidence: API correct: +esm exports named Network (F); declarations/network/Network.d.ts constructor(container:HTMLElement, data:Data, options?:Options); Edge type uses from/to (schema pins these correctly, not source/target); options physics/layout.hierarchical.enabled/interaction.hover are real; styles/vis-network.min.css returns 200 and is scoped (div.vis-network ...). globalStyleInjection=no: peer +esm injects no CSS (grep 0 head style) — catalog manually links the css into shadow. globalDomMutation=yes: Network appends the hover tooltip to document.body ('document.body.appendChild(this.popupDiv.html)') plus a transient img-measure body.append — the popup escapes shadow, but it is gated on node.title which the entry schema does NOT expose, so it is not triggered by normal schema use. globalEvents=no: autoResize adds window 'resize' but pushes removeEventListener into _cleanupCallbacks run on destroy() (verified) — cleaned, not a leak. shadowCompatible=conditional: canvas + manipulation UI render inside the provided container in shadow; only added node titles would leak a tooltip to body.
